M0310_STR_DOORWAYS (M0310) Narrow or Obstructed Doorways Structural barriers: narrow or obstructed doorways. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0310_STR_NONE (M0310) No Structural Barriers Structural barriers: none 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
